description: Strong self-projects but no production/work experience and little open source.

basics.name: Candidate E
basics.summary: Self-taught builder with several substantial personal projects.

projects.name: semantic-notes
projects.description: Note app with local embedding search; non-trivial architecture, live demo.

projects.name: mini-torch
projects.description: A small autograd engine reimplementing backprop from scratch.
highlights: Trains a small MLP on MNIST

projects.name: chat-rooms
projects.description: Real-time chat with WebSockets and presence.

labels.rationale: Genuinely strong, complex self-projects with live demos push self_projects high, but the complete absence of work experience caps production near zero and there is essentially no contribution to others' projects. Net total is medium.
